achievements.title: AgentOnDemand

achievements.title: PermaClipboard
achievements.description:
Cross-platform, Electron-based clipboard utility with transparent "Always on Top" glassmorphic UI. Features dual clipboard management with rolling history and quick access to frequently used commands, plus integrated anti-idle mouse mover to prevent session timeouts.

achievements.title: Meta Chain Salesforce Pipeline
achievements.description: Salesforce utility inspired by traditional Java pipeline processing, backed by custom metadata for flexible, configurable data flows.

achievements.title: KanByte - Kanban Board Application
achievements.description:
Full-featured Kanban board application for project and task management. Offers a streamlined interface to visualize and manage tasks across different stages, significantly improving team collaboration and productivity.

Links: Live App • GitHub

achievements.title: SNAP/MAGI - GenAI Chatbot
achievements.description: GenAI-powered chatbot using hosted LLM models for SNAP/MAGI screening solution, streamlining eligibility determinations.

achievements.title: Salesforce Multi-level Related List
achievements.description: Custom Lightning component for displaying hierarchical related records with multi-level depth navigation.

achievements.title: Support Squad - IoT Switch
achievements.description: End-to-end IoT proof-of-concept designed to eliminate customer service friction. ESP32-based "One-Touch" hardware switch instantly triggers Salesforce cases via secure endpoints. Features automated department routing and predictive maintenance using onboard temperature and vibration sensors.
